verbs.name: put
verbs.summary: Create or update an entry. Schema-validated. Returns {uid, etag}.

verbs.name: propose
verbs.summary: Write a proposal to the role's propose_lane. Auto-prefixes the key.

verbs.name: key_delete
verbs.summary: Delete one entry by key. Single-key, lower blast radius than key_delete_prefix; guarded by an optional optimistic-concurrency etag. Returns {ok, key, deleted}.

verbs.name: key_mv
verbs.summary: Rename one entry (same zone + format). Refuses if the target exists. Single-key, lower blast radius than key_mv_prefix.

verbs.name: accept
verbs.summary: apply a queued proposal to its target zone; requires the author capability

verbs.name: reject
verbs.summary: discard a queued proposal without applying it

verbs.name: enqueue
verbs.summary: Push a registered job type onto the convergence queue, to be run by drain/serve.

verbs.name: get
verbs.summary: Read one entry - a pure on-disk read annotated with a freshness verdict; never ingests (quarantine freshness is drain + hook only, ADR 0089). Returns the envelope (uid, etag, _meta, body, freshness).

verbs.name: ingest
verbs.summary: Capture external source material into the raw lane. Write-once, agent-owned.

verbs.name: list
verbs.summary: List keys filtered by lane and/or prefix.

verbs.name: where
verbs.summary: Resolve a key to its zone, owner, and path without reading the body.

verbs.name: uid
verbs.summary: Return the stable UID of an entry without reading its body.

verbs.name: blame
verbs.summary: Annotate audit rows for a key with the git commit that introduced each file state.

verbs.name: audit
verbs.summary: Query the audit log with optional filters.

verbs.name: deps
verbs.summary: List the keys a derived entry depends on (its projection/external sources).

verbs.name: rdeps
verbs.summary: List the derived entries that depend on a key (reverse deps / impact set).

verbs.name: pulse
verbs.summary: Delta since cursor — changed entries, pending proposals, index freshness.

verbs.name: rule_explain
verbs.summary: Effective rules for a key. Lean {lifecycle, guard} by default; detail: true adds matched blocks + guard predicates.

verbs.name: rule_list
verbs.summary: List every rule block in the manifest.

verbs.name: published
verbs.summary: List all entries that declare a publish_to target.

verbs.name: schema_show
verbs.summary: Return the schema (field shape) for an entry's family, by key.

verbs.name: doctor
verbs.summary: Run health checks on the textus store and report any issues.

verbs.name: boot
verbs.summary: Return the orientation contract: lanes, agent_quickstart, agent_protocol, and pre-computed artifacts.

verbs.name: jobs
verbs.summary: List queued jobs by state; retry a dead-lettered job or purge a state.

verbs.name: data_mv
verbs.summary: Rename a data lane — manifest + files. Refuses if destination exists.

verbs.name: key_mv_prefix
verbs.summary: Bulk-rename every leaf key under from_prefix to to_prefix. Dry-run returns a Plan; apply with dry_run: false.

verbs.name: key_delete_prefix
verbs.summary: Bulk-delete every leaf key under prefix.

verbs.name: drain
verbs.summary: Seed materialize + sweep jobs then drain the queue to empty. Identical to one Watcher tick. Use when no watcher is running.

verbs.name: rule_lint
verbs.summary: Diff candidate manifest YAML's rules against the live manifest. No writes.
